prompt: Draw a Douyin short video cover. Large title text fills the left half of the screen: "I'm in the Emotion Factory AI creating meme images; laughing so hard colleagues called the police". In the bottom right, the hashtags are "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter."
